caption: A monitor displays medical vital signs against a light-colored wall in a simulation setting. The screen shows a heart rate of "107" in green, an SpO2 of "99" in white, and a "CO2 No Sensor" message with the instruction "Touch when sensor connected." Other readings include a pulse of "107" and a respiratory rate of "13." A waveform of an ECG is visible at the top of the screen. The monitor is branded "TOSHIBA" on the bottom bezel, and a "Sim Week" logo appears in the bottom right corner of each shot. Throughout the sequence, the camera remains stationary, focusing on the screen. The numbers and waveforms shift slightly to reflect real-time changes in the simulated patient's vitals, but the overall composition and the "CO2 No Sensor" alert remain constant across the frames.
